quests.title: Daily house round (10 min)
quests.description: Walk the shared spaces once: dishes, trash, surfaces, bathroom check. Note anything that wants attention next.
quests.successCondition: Round completed; one honest note added if something's off.

quests.title: Weekly systems touch
quests.description: One small systems pass: supplies, calendar, who's hosting what, or a shared doc updated.

quests.title: Monthly deeper clean / repair
quests.description: Schedule or complete one deeper task: fridge, floors, a repair, or a room reset.
